content_en:
He will be permitted to come out at the end of the world: his point of departure will be Asbahan, specifically from a place ‘called Al-Yahudiyya (Judaism).'

Seventy thousands Jews of its inhabitants will support him with weapons and wearing shawl-like garments.

He will appear first as a tyrant king; then he will claim prophethood’ and godhood. The ignorant, and common people will follow him, while the pious and God-fearing believers, who are rightly guided by Allah, will stand against him.

He will conquer the world and capture each country, stronghold, region and town.

And there will be no town, which Ad-Dajjal will not enter except Makkah and Madinah.

The duration of his stay on earth will be forty days: one as long as a year, one as long as a month and one as long as a week. His remaining days will be as people's standard days. His average will be one year, two months and a fortnight.

Allah has granted him many supernatural phenomena that will mislead those destined for this, and make believers more faithful and rightly guided.

Jesus $21, son of Mary, "the Messiah of Guidance" will descend during the days of the False Messiah "Messiah of Misguidance" on the Eastern Minaret in Damascus.

There is no sound evidence of this.

Thave not come across any evidence that confirms this.

Believers will gather around him and pious servants of Allah will rally around him. Jesus %£) will lead them to kill AdDajjal, who has proceeded to Jerusalem. Ad-Daijjal will flee from him to the city of Ludd where Jesus $88! will catch him.

When Ad-Daijal faces Jesus 3¢5) he will melt as salt dissolves in water. Jesus %& will follow him and kill him with a spear at Ludd gate. This is where ad-Dajjal's death will occur.

A brief description of Ad-Daijjal, May Allah's curse be upon him

1. The sound Hadith previously mentioned confirm that he is "one-eyed".

cS He is "red" and in a clear narration he was described as "White". This can be taken to mean that he is: "White, light, reddish".

3. He is: "stout" and in another narration in the Hadith of assasah, he is described as "A well-built person"

4. "There will be written between his (Ad-Daijjal's) eyes the word kafir (unbeliever) to be read by all literate and illiterate believers", and in another narration, "to be read by all Muslims."

5. He is: "hairy" and that "his head looks like a python". In another narration: "his hair is curly and entangled" i.e. coarse and wavy

We ask Allah 4 to grant us protection and salvation from the trial of Ad-Dajjal, from the trial of living and dying, from the trial of prosperity and adversity and all other afflictions, concealed or visible. He 4& is the Honourable and the Majestic; He 48 is our Protector and Saviour. Our last supplication is Praise be to Allah, the Cherisher and Sustainer of the Worlds.

Po ote oat 2, Perr Ur eS SO EO BO BOR BX BR Be Bd
content_id:
Dia akan diizinkan keluar pada akhir zaman: titik keberangkatannya adalah Asbahan, khususnya dari sebuah tempat yang disebut Al-Yahudiyya (Yahudi).

Tujuh puluh ribu orang Yahudi dari penduduknya akan mendukungnya dengan senjata dan mengenakan pakaian seperti selendang.

Dia akan muncul pertama kali sebagai raja yang lalim; kemudian dia akan mengklaim sebagai nabi dan mengklaim ketuhanan. Orang-orang yang bodoh dan awam akan mengikutinya, sedangkan orang-orang yang saleh dan bertaqwa, yang diberi petunjuk oleh Allah, akan menentangnya.

Dia akan menaklukkan dunia dan merebut setiap negeri, benteng, wilayah, dan kota.

Dan tidak ada satu kota pun yang tidak akan dimasuki Ad-Dajjal kecuali Makkah dan Madinah.

Lama tinggalnya di bumi adalah empat puluh hari: satu hari seperti satu tahun, satu hari seperti satu bulan, dan satu hari seperti satu minggu. Hari-hari sisanya akan seperti hari-hari biasa manusia. Rata-rata masa tinggalnya adalah satu tahun, dua bulan, dan dua minggu.

Allah telah memberikannya banyak fenomena supernatural yang akan menyesatkan mereka yang memang ditakdirkan untuk itu, dan menjadikan orang-orang beriman semakin kuat iman dan petunjuknya.

Isa putra Maryam, "al-Masih Pembawa Petunjuk," akan turun pada masa kemunculan al-Masih Palsu "Masih Kesesatan" di Menara Timur di Damaskus.

Tidak ada dalil yang kuat mengenai hal ini.

Saya tidak menemukan dalil yang mengkonfirmasi hal ini.

Orang-orang beriman akan berkumpul di sekelilingnya dan para hamba Allah yang saleh akan berhimpun di sekitarnya. Isa akan memimpin mereka untuk membunuh Ad-Dajjal, yang telah menuju ke Yerusalem. Ad-Dajjal akan melarikan diri darinya menuju kota Ludd, di mana Isa akan menangkapnya.

Ketika Ad-Dajjal berhadapan dengan Isa, dia akan meleleh sebagaimana garam larut dalam air. Isa akan mengejarnya dan membunuhnya dengan tombak di gerbang Ludd. Di sinilah kematian Ad-Dajjal akan terjadi.

Deskripsi singkat tentang Ad-Dajjal, semoga laknat Allah atasnya

1. Hadith-hadith sahih yang telah disebutkan sebelumnya menegaskan bahwa dia "bermata satu".

2. Dia "merah" dan dalam riwayat yang jelas dia digambarkan sebagai "Putih". Ini dapat diartikan bahwa dia: "Putih, cerah, kemerahan".

3. Dia: "bertubuh gemuk" dan dalam riwayat lain dalam hadith al-Jassasah, dia digambarkan sebagai "Orang yang bertubuh tegap".

4. "Akan tertulis di antara kedua mata Ad-Dajjal kata kafir (orang yang tidak beriman) yang dapat dibaca oleh setiap mukmin, baik yang pandai membaca maupun yang buta huruf," dan dalam riwayat lain, "yang dapat dibaca oleh semua kaum Muslimin."

5. Dia: "berbulu lebat" dan "kepalanya tampak seperti ular piton". Dalam riwayat lain: "rambutnya keriting dan kusut" yakni kasar dan bergelombang.

Kami memohon kepada Allah agar memberikan kami perlindungan dan keselamatan dari fitnah Ad-Dajjal, dari fitnah kehidupan dan kematian, dari fitnah kemakmuran dan kesulitan, serta segala musibah lainnya, baik yang tersembunyi maupun yang tampak. Dialah Yang Maha Mulia dan Maha Agung; Dialah Pelindung dan Penyelamat kami. Doa terakhir kami adalah segala puji bagi Allah, Pemelihara dan Pengatur seluruh alam.

Po ote oat 2, Perr Ur eS SO EO BO BOR BX BR Be Bd
content_ar: He will be permitted to come out at the end of the الدنيا: his point of departure will be Asbahan, specifically from a place ‘called Al-Yahudiyya (Judaism).' Seventy thousands Jews of its inhabitants will support him with weapons and wearing shawl-like garments. He will appear أولاً as a tyrant king; then he will claim prophethood’ and godhood. The ignorant, and common people will follow him, بينما the pious and God-fearing المؤمنون, who are rightly guided by الله, will stand against him. He will conquer the الدنيا and capture each country, stronghold, region and town. And there will be no town, which Ad-الدجال will not enter except مكة المكرمة and المدينة المنورة. The duration of his stay on earth will be forty days: one as long as a year, one as long as a month and one as long as a week. His remaining days will be as people's standard days. His average will be one year, two months and a fortnight. الله has granted him many supernatural phenomena that will mislead those destined for this, and make المؤمنون more faithful and rightly guided. عيسى ﷺ $21, son of Mary, "the Messiah of الهداية" will descend خلال the days of the المسيح الدجال "Messiah of Misguidance" on the Eastern Minaret in Damascus. There is no sound evidence of this. Thave not come across any evidence that confirms this. المؤمنون will gather around him and pious servants of الله will rally around him. عيسى ﷺ %£) will lead them to kill AdDajjal, who has proceeded to Jerusalem. Ad-Daijjal will flee from him to the city of Ludd where عيسى ﷺ $88! will catch him. عندما Ad-Daijal faces عيسى ﷺ 3¢5) he will melt as salt dissolves in water. عيسى ﷺ %& will follow him and kill him with a spear at Ludd gate. This is where ad-الدجال's الموت will occur. A brief description of Ad-Daijjal, May الله's curse be upon him 1. The sound الحديث previously mentioned confirm that he is "one-eyed". cS He is "red" and in a clear narration he was described as "White". This can be taken to mean that he is: "White, light, reddish". 3. He is: "stout" and in another narration in the الحديث of assasah, he is described as "A well-built person" 4. "There will be written between his (Ad-Daijjal's) eyes the word kafir (unbeliever) to be read by all literate and illiterate المؤمنون", and in another narration, "to be read by all المسلمون." 5. He is: "hairy" and that "his head looks like a python". In another narration: "his hair is curly and entangled" i.e. coarse and wavy We ask الله 4 to grant us protection and النجاة from the الابتلاء of Ad-الدجال, from the الابتلاء of living and dying, from the الابتلاء of prosperity and adversity and all other afflictions, concealed or visible. He 4& is the Honourable and the Majestic; He 48 is our Protector and Saviour. Our last الدعاء is Praise be to الله, the Cherisher and Sustainer of the Worlds.
